rulings.Case Title: SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARNERS, LP, A CALIFORNIA VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 10, 2007, LINE 4. PLAINTIFF SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARTNERS, L.P.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT THIS DISPUTE IS GOVERNED BY COMMERICIAL CODE SECTION 2306 BECAUSE THE P.P.A IS NOT BASED ON THE ACTUAL REQUIREMENTS OF P.G & E. GIVEN THAT P.G.& E. PAID FOR THE RIGHT TO DEMAND FULL CAPACITY AND SUNNYSIDE ELECTED TO BE PAID ON THAT BASIS, TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT ARE PRESENTED AS TO P.G.& E.'S ALLEGED BREACH AND WHETHER THE PARTIES' CONDUCT, IN FACT, CONSTITUTED A MODIFICATION OF THE P.P.A. FULL CAPACITY REQUIREMENT. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARNERS, LP, A CALIFORNIA VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-07-463358 WITH CASE CGC-06-452312
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 10, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-07-463358 WITH CASE CGC-06-452312 IS DENIED FOR THE REASONS STATED IN CONNECTION WITH DEMURRER IN CASE #07-463358. P.G.& E. FAILED TO PLEAD ITS COMPULSORY COUNTER-CLAIM IN THIS ACTION. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: DANA LEE VS. OFFICE OF CITIZENS' COMPLAINTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 10, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANTS OFFICE OF CITIZENS' COMPLAINTS AND SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO C.P.R.A. CLAIM FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE, IF TRUE, THAT A REQUEST WAS MADE TO THE POLICE DEPARTMENT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENCE BECAUSE THE POLICE DEPARTMENT AND O.C.C. ARE IMMUNE FROM SUIT ON THAT CLAIM UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTIONS 820.2 AND 821.6. =(302/PJM/CB-X)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F LYMAN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 10, 2007, LINE 10. DEFENDANT MONTELLO, INC.'S AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING CONTINUED TO JULY 24, 2007 BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN TAKING INTO ACCOUNT PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION, PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION, PLAINTIFF'S ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEFENDANT'S ANSWER TO GENERAL ORDER INTERROGATORY 129. PLAINTIFF IS LACKING EVIDENCE THAT THE BAGS PLAINTIFF WAS EXPOSED TO CONTAINED ASBESTOS. THE COHN DECLARATION FAILS TO EXPLAIN HOW COHN REACHES THE CONCLUSION IN HIS DECLARATION AT PARAGRAPHS 9, 10 AND 11. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR THE CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF SOUGHT, ON A TIMELY BASIS, THE DEPOSITION ON THE PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE TO ADDRESS THE ISSUE EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS. SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARTNERS L.P. A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 10, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT SUNNYSIDE COGENERATION PARTNERS L.P.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMENDE. AS A CONSEQUENCE, P.G.& E.'S CLAIM FOR A REFUND ACCRUED AT THAT TIME. =(302/PJM/KD)
